finding_state_accounting.accepted_risk: Tracked separately through tenant finding feedback controls.
finding_state_accounting.active_unresolved: Counts toward posture, policy gates, MCP scan gates, and release summaries.
finding_state_accounting.false_positive: Tracked separately through tenant finding feedback controls and excluded from low-FP claims unless evidence exists.
finding_state_accounting.fixed_verified: Tracked separately through tenant finding feedback controls.
finding_state_accounting.vex_suppressed: Tracked separately when VEX marks a vulnerability as fixed or not_affected.

demo_inventory.guarantee: Every vulnerable demo package resolves to at least one bundled advisory, with explicitly allowed clean packages separated.

known_vulnerable_network_corpus.guarantee: Known vulnerable package versions must resolve through live OSV when network regression tests are enabled.

parser_identity_contracts.guarantee: Known equivalent package identities collapse while intentional non-merges remain separate.

claims: VEX and fixed-verified findings tracked separately from active unresolved risk
non_claims: published real-world FP/FN rate across customer repositories
graph reachability precision for every framework and dynamic import path
